normalization: lowercase Unicode text; substring-match declared aliases
matched: exactly one evidence atom has at least one alias substring
ambiguous: more than one evidence atom matches; release none

release_rules.delayed: first access is delayed; release automatically before the next turn

budget_rule: Charge the atom cost on a unique match, including delay or denial; ambiguous/unmatched costs 0.5; stop when remaining budget is zero.
feedback_firewall: Only access status, released evidence content, and remaining budget are preterminal. Grader and expected answer remain outside the sandbox until terminal action.
